sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_xor (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 BOOLEAN, value2 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_xor (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, true, true);
INSERT INTO test_xor (id, value1, value2) VALUES (2, true, false);
SELECT id, xor(value1, value2) AS result FROM test_xor;
UPDATE test_xor SET value1 = false WHERE id = 1;
